name: mafio69/ovh-ocr
description: PHP library for extracting text from images - Visual LLM (OVH AI Endpoints) with optional fallback to Google Vision. Support PL/EN.

suggest.vlucas/phpdotenv: To load configurations from an .env file in applications
suggest.mpdf/mpdf: To enable OcrClient::extractTextAsSearchablePdf() / SearchablePdfWriter (searchable PDF export) - not required for plain text extraction
suggest.ext-exif: To auto-correct JPEG EXIF orientation in SearchablePdfWriter (phone photos otherwise embed sideways) - gracefully skipped if missing
suggest.ext-gd: To physically rotate images per EXIF orientation in SearchablePdfWriter - gracefully skipped if missing

scripts-descriptions.check:asserts: Scans tests/ for trivial assertions (blocks if found)
scripts-descriptions.audit: Check for security vulnerabilities in dependencies
scripts-descriptions.all-checks: Run all checks: code style, audit, tests
